title: Jared Umphress
text: Hello there! I’m Jared Umphress. I am a third year Environmental Studies (B.S.) major at UC Santa Barbara. I am passionate about our environment and thus I am grateful to be learning and taking action on it in my academics. But I also like to get involved outside of school, whether that is attending local political meetings, or working at a farm. Click around the different tabs to learn more about me!
